meta.title: StoaBase — Build and Scale your Business. By prompt.
meta.description: Build and scale an AI-native business without building the infrastructure. One platform for app generation, agents, user management, and knowledge ingestion. Used by schools, start-ups, and builders worldwide.

hero.sub: Not just one app — an entire automated business from a prompt. Storefront, accounting, support, operations — every layer of your company built by AI, running together, sharing context.

prompts: Build me an AI nutrition app that scans meals and tracks macros
Create a company accounting dashboard with AI expense categorization
Launch an AI tutoring platform with adaptive quizzes and analytics
Deploy a medical records system with AI-powered patient insights
Ship a podcast studio with AI-generated episodes and show notes
Build a customer support copilot with knowledge search and voice

cost.heading: Test & launch at
cost.sub: Stop burning runway on dev teams and infrastructure. StoaBase lets you test, iterate, and launch a real AI-native business at a fraction of the traditional cost.
cost.ofThe:
of the effort.
of the budget.
of the time.
cost.bottomLine: Same product. Same users. Same AI intelligence.
cost.bottomLineStrong: Just 10× cheaper to prove it works.

scale.heading: Scale 1 to 100.
scale.sub: Start with one AI app. Prove it works. Then scale to an entire product suite — all sharing users, data, and intelligence. That's how you build a billion-dollar business.

launch.desc: Validate your idea in weeks, not months

growth.desc: Full AI-native business suite running autonomously

unicorn.desc: Platform effects compound. Every app makes every other app better.

how.heading: From idea to production
how.sub: No infrastructure. No dev team. Just describe what you need.
how.step1Desc: Type a prompt. "Build me an AI nutrition tracker with meal scanning." That's it — plain English.
how.step2Desc: StoaBase wires up the right AI models, data layer, knowledge base, user roles, and analytics — automatically.
how.step3Desc: Your app is live. Add more apps to your workspace — they all share context, users, and AI capabilities.

traction.heading: Already in production.
traction.sub: Education proved the platform. Healthcare confirmed it scales.

quote: "One business. Many apps. Every app shares users, knowledge, memory, and analytics — that's building an AI-native company."

autonomous.heading: Everything you need to run
autonomous.sub: One platform. Build a full suite of AI apps for your business — all sharing context, users, and intelligence.

platform.heading: The AI base layer for
platform.sub: 12+ core services. One platform. Zero vendor sprawl.

cta.heading: The foundation for
cta.sub: One platform. Full AI stack. No Code.

cap.aiDesc: 50+ models, routing, chat, streaming, tools, memory
cap.dataDesc: KV storage, user records, structured data
cap.workflowDesc: Visual flow builder, MCP, tool orchestration

tabs.rodysseySubline: AI-powered Smart Campus — from classroom to home
tabs.iomicsSubline: Personal healthcare & clinical AI — from vitals to insights
tabs.yourbizSubline: Launch your next big app idea with autonomous AI infrastructure
tabs.roAgentDesc: Personal AI tutor companion — before, during and after class with knowledge support.
tabs.realmDesc: A private NotebookLM — synthesize any content into knowledge, audio, and interactive learning.
tabs.aiLessonDesc: Generate interactive lessons and quizzes from textbook content.
tabs.magicCardDesc: AR flashcards — scan printed cards to unlock 3D learning.
tabs.classAnalyticsDesc: Per-student and class-wide AI insights for teachers.
tabs.aiWorksheetDesc: Interactive, AI-scaffolded worksheets with shadow teacher support.
tabs.mediVaultDesc: AI-powered patient records with clinical knowledge base.
tabs.nutriScanDesc: Scan meals, track macros, get personalised nutrition coaching.
tabs.symptomCheckDesc: AI triage — describe symptoms, get guided next steps.
tabs.medSchedulerDesc: Smart appointment booking with AI-optimised scheduling.
tabs.rxTrackerDesc: Medication management with AI adherence coaching.
tabs.wellnessAIDesc: Mental health check-ins, mood tracking, and AI journaling.
tabs.rpgStudioDesc: Build a complete 2D RPG with generated sprite assets, dynamic quests, and autonomous live-ops.
tabs.matchMakerDesc: A dating app powered by vector similarity matching, autonomous icebreakers, and behavioral analytics.
tabs.alphaQuantDesc: Personal hedge-fund AI — real-time portfolio tracking, sentiment analysis, and automated trade alerts.
tabs.matchMakerPrompt: "Build an AI-first dating app that actually works"
tabs.alphaQuantPrompt: "Build an autonomous investment tracking and analysis app"
